entities.context: Mandatory design principle for detecting failures, maintaining sync, and handling breakages

entities.context: Classification system with Critical, Coupled, and Independent categories for assessing change impact

entities.name: Architecture Decisions
entities.context: Framework covering approach selection (New build/Refactor/Consolidate/Delete), rationale, and component design

entities.name: Data Flow
entities.context: Pattern for documenting Input → Transform → Output paths and formats

entities.name: Registry-First Sync
entities.context: Sync strategy option where registry is source of truth

entities.name: Filesystem-First Sync
entities.context: Sync strategy option where filesystem is source of truth

entities.name: Graceful Degradation
entities.context: Failure handling approach for when systems break

entities.name: Monitoring
entities.context: Approach for observing system health and detecting issues

relationships.context: Architectural principles from Phase 0 guide decision rationale
Health checks are the method for detecting failures
Monitoring is the approach for observing system state
Registry-first is one sync strategy option
Filesystem-first is one sync strategy option
Dependency analysis informs architectural approach selection
